title: Smoked Chicken and Algerian Spices Tagine
description: A twist on traditional Chinese cuisine, this flavorful tagine dish combines the smokiness of smoked chicken with the bold flavors of Algerian spices.

ingredients.name: Algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern or North African markets

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the cumin, coriander, and ginger and stir for 1-2 minutes.
Add the smoked chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the tender chicken thighs and stir to combine.
Sprinkle the Algerian spice blend over the chicken and stir to coat.
Add the green onions and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Braise the chicken for 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
